summary:
Significant laterally displaced or fractured-condyles necessitate urgent open reduction surgery to avoid neurovascular compromise and promote correct bone realignment. \boxed{Lateral displacement/Dislocation}

The summary captures that severe lateral displacement requires prompt corrective action via open reduction while highlighting its importance relative to preventing neurological issues and ensuring effective treatment outcomes. The boxed answer reflects this conclusion directly related to absolute indications as per medical guidelines.
